title: DINOsmp Mod - Industrial Evolution
description: A multiplayer-focused modpack emphasizing industrial automation, challenging survival mechanics, and optimized performance for long-term SMP play.
body:
# DINOsmp Modpack — Industrial Automation & Hardcore SMP Experience

> A performance-optimized Minecraft modpack built for multiplayer SMP servers, combining Create mod automation, hardcore survival mechanics, and long-term world stability.

---

## 🆕 Updated for Version 1.2.3

DINOsmp 1.2.3 delivers improved stability, optimized performance, and refined configuration balancing for smooth multiplayer gameplay.

### Update Highlights:
- Enhanced client & server performance
- Improved SMP stability for long-running worlds
- Configuration refinements and balance adjustments
- Minor bug fixes and internal optimizations
- Better reliability for multiplayer environments

---

## 🔧 What is DINOsmp?

DINOsmp is a **Minecraft SMP-focused modpack** designed for players who enjoy:

- Industrial automation using the Create mod
- Hardcore survival systems (temperature & survival mechanics)
- Cooperative multiplayer gameplay
- Stable long-term world progression
- Optimized performance for low-to-mid range PCs

This modpack is built for **NeoForge environments** and is ideal for private servers, community SMPs, and content creators.

---

## ⚙️ Core Features

### 🏭 Industrial Automation (Create-Based)
- Mechanical systems and factory building
- Balanced progression for SMP environments
- Automation without overwhelming complexity

### ❄️ Hardcore Survival Mechanics
- Environmental challenges
- Resource management focus
- Survival-based gameplay balance

### 🌐 Multiplayer Optimized
- Server-friendly configuration
- Reduced lag for automation-heavy worlds
- Designed for cooperative long-term play

### 🚀 Performance & Optimization
- FPS improvements
- Memory-efficient configurations
- Smooth gameplay experience on mid-range systems

---

## 🎮 Perfect For

- Minecraft SMP servers
- Create mod players
- Hardcore survival enthusiasts
- Long-term multiplayer worlds
- Automation-focused communities

---

## 📌 Why Choose DINOsmp?

Unlike kitchen-sink modpacks, DINOsmp focuses on:
- Clear progression
- Multiplayer stability
- Industrial gameplay balance
- Performance optimization

Create. Survive. Automate. Evolve.

---

*Report bugs or suggestions via Modrinth Issues.*
